prompt:
A simple temperature line chart displayed on a screen or printed card, showing a single clean line trending over time with a subtle grid and a few unlabeled tick marks. The chart is intentionally minimal and textless, visually communicating “logged temperature readings over time” without any readable axis labels; a sensor probe and small data-logger box sit nearby to link it to measurement.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future lab/desk aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic paper or screen reflections, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the chart centered and uncluttered so it reads clearly as a temperature time-series graph.
